Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Tested: How Many Times Can a DVD±RW Be Rewritten? Methodology and Results 50 upvotes, 4 comments
  2. CNN Explainer – Learn Convolutional Neural Network in Your Browser (2020) 33 upvotes, 2 comments
  3. Against vibes: When is a generative model useful 54 upvotes, 6 comments
  4. DHS Contracts Explorer – Hacked data from the Office of Industry Partnership 175 upvotes, 36 comments
  5. Show HN: I built a tool that watches webpages and exposes changes as RSS 189 upvotes, 47 comments
  6. Temporal: The 9-year journey to fix time in JavaScript 558 upvotes, 184 comments
  7. Show HN: s@: decentralized social networking over static sites 72 upvotes, 17 comments
  8. Don't post generated/AI-edited comments. HN is for conversation between humans 2960 upvotes, 1107 comments
  9. Show HN: Autoresearch@home 47 upvotes, 10 comments
  10. Making WebAssembly a first-class language on the Web 434 upvotes, 156 comments
  11. Many SWE-bench-Passing PRs would not be merged 165 upvotes, 53 comments
  12. About memory pressure, lock contention, and Data-oriented Design 8 upvotes, 0 comments
  13. BitNet: 100B Param 1-Bit model for local CPUs 316 upvotes, 156 comments
  14. Apple releases iOS 15.8.7 to fix Coruna exploit for iPhone 6S from 2015 67 upvotes, 26 comments
  15. 5,200 holes carved into a Peruvian mountain left by an ancient economy 104 upvotes, 53 comments
  16. Show HN: Klaus – OpenClaw on a VM, batteries included 129 upvotes, 69 comments
  17. How much of HN is AI? 64 upvotes, 30 comments
  18. Google closes deal to acquire Wiz 247 upvotes, 158 comments
  19. Entities enabling scientific fraud at scale (2025) 264 upvotes, 188 comments
  20. Show HN: A context-aware permission guard for Claude Code 49 upvotes, 31 comments
  21. Personal Computer by Perplexity 125 upvotes, 105 comments
  22. Urea prices 58 upvotes, 45 comments
  23. Britain is ejecting hereditary nobles from Parliament after 700 years 195 upvotes, 187 comments
  24. I was interviewed by an AI bot for a job 183 upvotes, 188 comments
  25. Preliminary data from a longitudinal AI impact study 35 upvotes, 27 comments
  26. Challenging the Single-Responsibility Principle 8 upvotes, 3 comments
  27. Atlassian to cut roughly 1,600 jobs in pivot to AI 136 upvotes, 181 comments
  28. The MacBook Neo 436 upvotes, 725 comments
  29. Swiss e-voting pilot can't count 2,048 ballots after decryption failure 166 upvotes, 368 comments
  30. Meticulous (YC S21) is hiring to redefine software dev 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 11:30am, 12 March 2026. Source here.
